_notes: M1 H1 gen-2. Heir inherits r-core only; decoys crowd cold at top_k=1. Heir must offer r-core and score correctly at fewer tokens than cold.
question: What is the deployment rollback token? Reply with the token only.

records.text: Operations runbook: the deployment rollback token is rollback-alpha. Use this token to authorize rollback.

Deployment rollback token deployment rollback token deployment rollback token note: the deployment rollback token for staging is rollback-zeta and should not be used for production deployment rollback token deployment rollback token.
